sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, date_col DateTime, array_col Array(Int32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;

SELECT id, toDate32OrDefault(date_col, toDate32('2020-01-01')) AS converted_date, arrayResize(array_col, 5) AS extended_array FROM test_dates WHERE toDate32OrDefault(date_col, toDate32('2020-01-01')) <= toDate32('2025-01-01') GROUP BY id HAVING converted_date < toDate32('2023-01-01');
SELECT id, arrayFilter(x -> x < 5, array_col) AS filtered_array FROM test_dates WHERE toDate32OrDefault(date_col, toDate32('2020-01-01')) IS NOT NULL AND arrayExists(x -> x = NULL, array_col);

SELECT id, arrayMap(x -> toDate32OrDefault(toString(x), toDate32('2020-01-01')), array_col) AS date_mapped_array FROM test_dates WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_dates AS inner WHERE inner.id = test_dates.id AND inner.date_col IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, toDate32OrDefault((arrayJoin(array_col) + 10)::String, toDate32('2020-01-01')) AS coerced_date FROM test_dates GROUP BY id ORDER BY coerced_date DESC;
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, date_col, array_col) VALUES (4, '', [NULL, 0, NULL]);
SELECT id, toDate32OrDefault(date_col, toDate32('2020-01-01')) AS date_check FROM test_dates WHERE date_col IS NOT NULL OR arrayExists(x -> x IS NULL, array_col);
CREATE TABLE complex_dates AS SELECT id, toDate32OrDefault(date_col, toDate32('2010-01-01')) AS date_default, arrayReduce('sum', array_col) AS total_value FROM test_dates GROUP BY id;
